white.$description: Pure white — used for light mode surfaces, text on dark, and transparent overlays.

white_a80.$description: White at 80% opacity — frosted glass / backdrop blur effects in light mode.

white_a60.$description: White at 60% opacity — subtle overlay for glassy card surfaces.

white_a20.$description: White at 20% opacity — placeholder text on dark backgrounds.

white_a0.$description: Fully transparent white — gradient start point for bar backdrops.

black.$description: Pure black — dark mode gradient base.

black_a80.$description: Black at 80% opacity — dark mode backdrop/scrim overlay.

custom_21_20_23_a70.$description: Near-black with warm undertone at 70% opacity — dark mode card gradient overlay.

50.$description: Lightest gray — light mode modal background, subtle section dividers.

100.$description: Light gray — inner sections of modal and icon chip fills in light mode.

300.$description: Medium-light gray — primary text in dark mode at full opacity.

400_a8.$description: Gray-400 at 8% opacity — dark mode default border, ultra-subtle dividers.

400_a40.$description: Gray-400 at 40% opacity — dark mode secondary text and icon stroke.

400_a80.$description: Gray-400 at 80% opacity — dark mode primary icon stroke and secondary fills.

800.$description: Dark gray — dark mode modal sections and icon chip backgrounds.

850.$description: Very dark gray — dark mode gradient secondary stop.

900.$description: Near-black gray — dark mode primary surface, cards, and modals.

950.$description: Darkest gray (near-black) — dark mode bar backdrop gradient end.

950_a0.$description: Darkest gray at 0% opacity — transparent gradient start for bar backdrop in dark.

800.$description: Deep navy blue — dark mode gradient secondary stop (main_2).

900.$description: Darkest navy — light mode primary text, icons, logos, and fills.

900_a8.$description: Navy-900 at 8% opacity — light mode subtle borders and dividers.

900_a20.$description: Navy-900 at 20% opacity — light mode placeholder and hint text.

900_a40.$description: Navy-900 at 40% opacity — light mode secondary text and icon strokes.

50.$description: Faintest blue tint — light mode gradient base (general and main).

100.$description: Light sky blue — light mode gradient secondary stop (main_2).

200.$description: Very light blue — light mode XAUT card gradient second stop.

500.$description: Primary brand blue — light mode action text and interactive elements.

500_a80.$description: Brand blue at 80% opacity — dark mode action/link text, softened for dark surfaces.

general.$description: Primary app background in light mode — pure white for maximum contrast and clarity.

card.$description: Card surface background in light mode — white maintains visual separation via shadow rather than color.

modal.$description: Modal container background — faintest gray to slightly elevate modal above page content.

modal_section.$description: Modal inner section background — white for content groupings within the modal.

modal_section_inner.$description: Innermost modal content area — light gray to create subtle depth hierarchy within modal.

backdrop.$description: Frosted glass backdrop in light mode — 80% white creates blur effect over page content.

core.$description: Highest-emphasis text — balance amounts, large headings, primary data values. Darkest navy for maximum legibility.

primary.$description: Primary body and heading text — section titles and main labels.

secondary.$description: Secondary/supporting text — captions, metadata, supporting labels at 40% navy opacity.

action.$description: Interactive/action text — links, CTAs, tappable labels. Brand blue signals affordance.

placeholder.$description: Placeholder and hint text — lowest contrast for empty states and input hints at 20% navy.

icon_primary.$description: Primary icon stroke/fill in light mode — full navy for strong, legible icons.

icon_secondary.$description: Secondary/decorative icon stroke in light mode — 40% navy for lower-emphasis icons.

default.$description: Default border/divider in light mode — ultra-subtle 8% navy line for list separators and card edges.

icon_chip.$description: Icon chip/tag background in light mode — light gray pill background to house icons.

secondary.$description: Secondary solid fill in light mode — full navy for secondary buttons and solid icon backgrounds.

tertiary.$description: Tertiary fill in light mode — white for outlined/ghost elements and light surface fills.

logo.$description: Logo fill color in light mode — navy to maintain brand identity on white backgrounds.

color_1.$description: Themeable fill slot 1 in light mode — white for illustrative or decorative elements.

color_2.$description: Themeable fill slot 2 in light mode — white for secondary illustrative elements.

general_1.$description: First stop of general page gradient in light mode — faintest blue tint.

general_2.$description: Second stop of general page gradient in light mode — transitions to light gray.

main_1.$description: First stop of main hero gradient in light mode — faintest blue.

main_2.$description: Second stop of main hero gradient in light mode — light sky blue for depth.

xaut_card_1.$description: First stop of XAUT card gradient in light mode — 60% white for glassmorphism effect.

xaut_card_2.$description: Second stop of XAUT card gradient in light mode — very light blue for brand-tinted glass.

bar_backdrop_1.$description: Transparent start of navigation bar backdrop gradient — fades from nothing.

bar_backdrop_2.$description: Opaque end of navigation bar backdrop gradient — full white for solid nav bar base.

general.$description: Primary app background in dark mode — near-black gray for OLED-friendly deep dark surface.

card.$description: Card surface in dark mode — elevation expressed via subtle borders rather than color lift.

modal.$description: Modal container background in dark mode — unified dark surface to float above app content.

modal_section.$description: Modal section background in dark mode — slightly lighter dark panel to create inner grouping depth.

modal_section_inner.$description: Innermost modal content area in dark mode — returns to base surface for nested content.

backdrop.$description: Scrim/backdrop in dark mode — 80% black overlay to dim content behind modals and sheets.

core.$description: Highest-emphasis text in dark mode — pure white for critical data like balance amounts and primary headings.

primary.$description: Primary body and heading text in dark mode — medium-light gray for comfortable reading on dark surfaces.

secondary.$description: Secondary/supporting text in dark mode — 40% gray for captions and metadata.

action.$description: Interactive/action text in dark mode — 80% brand blue softened for dark surface legibility.

placeholder.$description: Placeholder and hint text in dark mode — 20% white for empty states and input hints.

icon_primary.$description: Primary icon stroke in dark mode — 80% gray for legible but non-glaring icon rendering.

icon_secondary.$description: Secondary icon stroke in dark mode — 40% gray for decorative and lower-priority icons.

default.$description: Default border/divider in dark mode — 8% gray for subtle separators that don't overpower dark content.

icon_chip.$description: Icon chip/tag background in dark mode — dark elevated surface for icon containers.

secondary.$description: Secondary solid fill in dark mode — 80% gray for secondary buttons and solid backgrounds.

tertiary.$description: Tertiary fill in dark mode — base surface color for ghost/outlined element fills.

logo.$description: Logo fill in dark mode — pure white for brand mark visibility on dark backgrounds.

color_1.$description: Themeable fill slot 1 in dark mode — white for illustrative or decorative elements.

color_2.$description: Themeable fill slot 2 in dark mode — white for secondary illustrative elements.

general_1.$description: First stop of general page gradient in dark mode — pure black for deep gradient base.

general_2.$description: Second stop of general page gradient in dark mode — very dark gray for subtle gradient fade.

main_1.$description: First stop of main hero gradient in dark mode — absolute black for dramatic dark depth.

main_2.$description: Second stop of main hero gradient in dark mode — deep navy adds brand warmth to dark gradients.

xaut_card_1.$description: First stop of XAUT card gradient in dark mode — near-black at 70% for glassmorphism over dark.

xaut_card_2.$description: Second stop of XAUT card gradient in dark mode — elevated dark gray for card depth.

bar_backdrop_1.$description: Transparent start of navigation bar backdrop gradient in dark — fades from zero opacity.

bar_backdrop_2.$description: Opaque end of navigation bar backdrop gradient in dark — near-black for solid dark nav bar base.
